content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Completed the pending t7j remediation in the current tree. In `src/adapters/worktree.rs`, checkpoint construction now stages into the temporary index, enumerates tracked ignored and `assume-unchanged` paths, restores any paths that are still tracked in the real index via `git update-index -z --index-info`, and only force-removes paths that are already absent from the real index. That preserves the real-index version for tracked ignored files while still omitting paths that were explicitly untracked with `git rm --cached`. In `tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs`, the checkpoint assertions now cover the corrected behavior for tracked `.gitignore`, `.git/info/exclude`, `core.excludesFile`, `assume-unchanged`, tab-containing `assume-unchanged`, and non-UTF-8 paths, while keeping the explicit-untrack case omitted from checkpoint commits. Part B remains satisfied on this branch: `result` is no longer tracked, and no tracked ignored paths remain in the index.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the current checkpoint implementation and regression coverage against the pending amendment, including tracked ignored-path handling, assume-unchanged handling, and the branch state for `result`.
2. [Completed] Remediate `WorktreeAdapter::build_checkpoint_tree` so tracked ignored and assume-unchanged paths are restored from the real index after temp-index staging, while paths already absent from the real index are still removed from the checkpoint tree.
3. [Completed] Update checkpoint regression coverage to assert preservation of the real-index version for tracked ignored and assume-unchanged paths, while retaining omission coverage for paths explicitly untracked from the real index.
4. [Completed] Run formatting, linting, focused checkpoint tests, the full requested test suite, and the authoritative `nix build` gate, then capture remaining repo-wide failures.

## Validation Evidence

- `nl -ba src/adapters/worktree.rs | sed -n '130,310p'` shows the corrected checkpoint flow: tracked ignored paths are discovered with `git ls-files -z -i -c --exclude-standard` at lines 137-153, assume-unchanged paths are parsed from `git ls-files -z -s -v` at lines 155-177, tracked real-index entries are captured at lines 179-207, restored into the temporary index at lines 229-259, and only paths absent from the real index are force-removed in `build_checkpoint_tree` at lines 280-292.
- `nl -ba tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs | sed -n '70,820p'` shows helper coverage for asserting preserved checkpoint content and regressions covering tracked `.gitignore`, explicit `rm --cached`, `assume-unchanged`, tab-containing `assume-unchanged`, `.git/info/exclude`, `core.excludesFile`, and non-UTF-8 filenames at lines 80-185 and 435-783.
- `git diff --stat -- src/adapters/worktree.rs tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs` reports the intended scope: 205 insertions and 13 deletions across the checkpoint implementation and regression tests.
- `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` returns no paths on the current branch, confirming there are no remaining tracked ignored files.
- `printf 'tracked-result='; git ls-files -- result` prints only `tracked-result=`, confirming `result` is not tracked in the current tree.
- `git log --oneline -- result | head -n 5` shows `70eabf73 chore(git): stop tracking result symlink`, confirming the Part B untracking commit is present in branch history.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub --test unit checkpoint_test:: -- --nocapture` exited 0; all 11 checkpoint tests passed, including the tracked-gitignored preservation, explicit-untrack omission, assume-unchanged preservation, tab-containing assume-unchanged preservation, `.git/info/exclude`, `core.excludesFile`, and non-UTF-8 cases.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exited 101; the only reported failure was `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` at `tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:8917`.
- `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exited 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/7q28j6af0yfd16yl9i0g16xan8bd3fpn-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`.

## Outstanding Risks

- The required full test suite is still red outside the checkpoint change scope: `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exits 101 because `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` fails at `tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:8917` with `ResumeFailed { reason: "stage review failed: remediation exhausted at cycle 4; maximum supported cycles is 3" }`.
- The authoritative gate is still red outside the checkpoint change scope: `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exits 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/7q28j6af0yfd16yl9i0g16xan8bd3fpn-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`. Acceptance is not fully met until that passes.
